baseline.observed: selectedPrompt searched all loaded prompts before falling back to the filtered list, so the detail panel could continue showing a prompt hidden by the current search filter.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because src/selection.ts did not exist.

change.summary: Added selectedPromptForView and routed the detail panel selection through the currently visible filtered prompt list.

safety_controls: No new npm dependency was added.
Selection is preserved when the selected prompt remains visible.
Selection returns empty when no prompts match the current filter.
